req.title: Data retention (audit)
req.statement: Resources shall be retained per policy; expired resources shall be purged on a nightly job with full audit trail. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for resource retention policy, nightly purge job, and audit trail requirements.

Requirement: Resources shall be retained per policy; expired resources shall be purged
on a nightly job with full audit trail. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every
operation and tested end-to-end.
"""

import uuid
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from enum import Enum
from typing import Any
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, call, patch

import pytest


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (production code would live in src/)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ResourceStatus(str, Enum):
    ACTIVE = "active"
    EXPIRED = "expired"
    PURGED = "purged"
    RETAINED = "retained"


class AuditEventType(str, Enum):
    RESOURCE_CREATED = "resource.created"
    RESOURCE_EXPIRED = "resource.expired"
    RESOURCE_RETAINED = "resource.retained"
    RESOURCE_PURGED = "resource.purged"
    PURGE_JOB_STARTED = "purge_job.started"
    PURGE_JOB_COMPLETED = "purge_job.completed"
    PURGE_JOB_FAILED = "purge_job.failed"
    POLICY_EVALUATED = "policy.evaluated"


@dataclass
class RetentionPolicy:
    policy_id: str
    name: str
    retain_days: int
    resource_type: str
    enabled: bool = True


@dataclass
class Resource:
    resource_id: str
    resource_type: str
    created_at: datetime
    status: ResourceStatus = ResourceStatus.ACTIVE
    policy_id: str | None = None
    expires_at: datetime | None = None
    purged_at: datetime | None = None
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class AuditEvent:
    event_id: str
    event_type: AuditEventType
    timestamp: datetime
    actor: str
    resource_id: str | None
    policy_id: str | None
    details: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    correlation_id: str | None = None


@dataclass
class PurgeJobResult:
    job_id: str
    started_at: datetime
    completed_at: datetime | None
    resources_evaluated: int
    resources_purged: int
    resources_retained: int
    errors: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    status: str = "completed"


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fake implementations (stand-ins for real repositories / services)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class FakeResourceRepository:
    def __init__(self):
        self._resources: dict[str, Resource] = {}

    def save(self, resource: Resource) -> Resource:
        self._resources[resource.resource_id] = resource
        return resource

    def get(self, resource_id: str) -> Resource | None:
        return self._resources.get(resource_id)

    def list_expired(self, as_of: datetime) -> list[Resource]:
        return [
            r for r in self._resources.values()
            if r.expires_at is not None
            and r.expires_at <= as_of
            and r.status not in (ResourceStatus.PURGED,)
        ]

    def list_by_status(self, status: ResourceStatus) -> list[Resource]:
        return [r for r in self._resources.values() if r.status == status]

    def count(self) -> int:
        return len(self._resources)


class FakeAuditRepository:
    def __init__(self):
        self._events: list[AuditEvent] = []

    def append(self, event: AuditEvent) -> AuditEvent:
        self._events.append(event)
        return event

    def list_all(self) -> list[AuditEvent]:
        return list(self._events)

    def list_by_type(self, event_type: AuditEventType) -> list[AuditEvent]:
        return [e for e in self._events if e.event_type == event_type]

    def list_for_resource(self, resource_id: str) -> list[AuditEvent]:
        return [e for e in self._events if e.resource_id == resource_id]
